ocr_findings.description: OCR header reads '開 3 章 経営戦略マネジメント' — the image shows '第3章 経営戦略マネジメント' in the right-side chapter tab (vertical text). '開' is a wrong character substitution for '第'. This is a side-margin vertical text element; low severity as it does not affect question content.
Answer line at bottom of page is present in OCR: '問題3-5 ア　問題3-6 ウ　問題3-7 イ　問題3-8 エ'. Image confirms same. No loss — this is a PASS item.

reviewer_notes: Page contains four exam questions (問題3-5 through 3-8) with ア/イ/ウ/エ answer choices, plus the answer key line at the bottom. All question stems, all choice text, and the answer line are faithfully reproduced. The only defect is the chapter tab vertical text '第' being read as '開' — a minor wrong-char substitution in a non-content element. Answer line integrity confirmed (PASS for answer_line_loss check).
